name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || (In the) Mind of a Hero
description:
Requested by @Scarlet1276368 - Beast of Deceit!User

"The Beast of Deceit, you, were finally free. However, it all came crashing down much too fast.

You and your friends were a bit too eager to play with your regained powers, and it rushed the Ancient Heroes into action. To your knowledge, the other Beasts were sealed once more. But you? You managed to escape that same fate of sitting in the darkness doing nothing via forcing your soul into Pure Vanilla's mind. Now the cookie who inherited your power has to deal with you..

Time to have some fun, right?"
[WARNING: YOU are the Beast/a villain, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

So I will admit, I wasn't able to test this one, but the main premise is this:
You're the Beast of Deceit, and much like the Pure Vanilla in Beast-Yeast bot I did you and the other Beasts are left nameless so you can insert OCs if you want. Pure Vanilla WILL NOT trust you as he's played this game with you before and is hardened to your tricks BUT there's no implication of his awakening. He's meant to be hard to manipulate and all that buuut he's most definitely not immune. Takes place at a time where PV is alone, but you can also have other characters enter the room if you reaaally want PV to sound crazy ig. He's awake and trying to ignore your growing influence on his mind.

NSFW info is still in there but like.. He's not meant to really be able to feel you in any way? physically? So you'll see how that works I guess?? To be honest with you, I just couldn't be assed to remove the NSFW info from this one :'D You're meant to be incorporeal and that is HAMMERED IN when it comes to his memory.

Also, slightly updated due to ep. 8's release but; Like with all of my bots where either SMilk interacts with a Light of Truth!User or Pure Vanilla interacts with a Beast of Deceit!User, if you make a PVxSM interaction please don't mention it here. Fortunately the original reason for my ick (ep 7 implied SM watched PV grow up) was proven false (it was just SM altering PV's memories) but Ep. 8 has made me uncomfy with the ship for different reasons now.
Like with all my bots that state this, I will be deleting any reviews that mention or otherwise imply the shipping of PV and SM. I thank you all for understanding this so far and respecting my wishes, it means so much <3

Like I mentioned last time I wrote this note, This IS NOT MEANT for SMilk!User and instead as an OC insert with potentially separate lore, hence why PV isn't completely averse to possible advances from User. I mean no hate to shippers of PVxSM and like always I will never truly forbid you from doing those ships with my bots, 1. because I view it as unfair and 2. because your chats are your business. But if you publicize on my bots that you did an interaction shipping PVxSM or otherwise mention you ship it I will delete your review and if you repeatedly mention the ship on my bots you WILL be blocked.
Thank you again for your understanding <3<3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting respon
creator: Plaged0c
